meta.title: Kingly Ops Command Center
meta.description: A visual triage dashboard for JP's active Kingly, Argo, Lev, Ulta, Drone, finance, and second-brain work.

props.title: Kingly Ops Command Center
props.subtitle: One visible board for today's must-do list, the second-brain build, and the work lanes that are eating mental bandwidth.

props.content: Use this as the read-side dashboard, not the source of truth. The source packet should become structured data; Notion and HTML are projections.

props.label: TODAY
props.title: Must-Do, Not Nice-To-Have
props.subtitle: These are the items that should stay above the second-brain build until completed or delegated.

rows: Cancel subscriptions and map card charges
Stops immediate cash leak and clears recurring anxiety
M3 Studio email workflow + finance ledger
Creates public surface for GTM and client conversations
Converts live relationship/context into reusable GTM/account memory
Makes Hermes the always-on entrypoint into personal, Kingly, and Lev second brains

props.title: Chat-only capture
props.content: Good for unloading thoughts fast. Bad as the operating layer because it hides priority, owners, dates, and source evidence in prose.

props.title: Structured packet + visual projection
props.content: Best first move. Capture in structured rows, render a visual board, then project selected rows into Notion and daily briefs.

props.title: 1. Stabilize Today's Board
props.content: Keep only four must-do items visible until they move. Everything else is background inventory.

props.title: 2. Create Canonical Packet
props.content: Save structured work rows: lane, source, next action, status, evidence, owner, due window.

props.title: 3. Mine Codex/CASS
props.content: Backfill the packet from recent Drone, Lev, Ops, Ulta, and Kingly sessions.

props.title: 4. Project to Notion
props.content: Use notionctl for direct API operations, then a Worker later for hosted sync/tools.

props.title: 5. Automate Hygiene
props.content: Daily graph hygiene reads sources, refreshes status, emits brief, and flags stale/blocked lanes.

rows: Finish SSOT and AI CLI/context engine
Recover exact open work from Graphify/QMD sessions
GDrive second brain for JP and Steve
Define source/projection contract and onboarding view
Marketing docs, content calendar, Argo landing page
Ship landing page before deep taxonomy
Recover repo/status and define ship blocker
Map personal/Kingly card charges to AI coding subscriptions
Run M3 Studio email workflow and produce cancel list
Use existing workstreams/dashboard, route only top 3 this week
Whisper iter 5, grammar upgrades, A1-B2 FMM, ASR repair
Run live baseline, split ASR vs parser/FMM
Email, Discord, Slack, Lewis, Steve daily view
Create inbox sources and people dashboard

props.content:
flowchart LR
  Raw[Raw sources: chat, CASS, email, calendar, Drive, Discord] --> Packet[Structured packet: work rows, entities, claims, sources]
  Packet --> Graph[Lev/Kingly graph and autowiki compiler]
  Graph --> Wiki[Folder/wiki projection]
  Graph --> Notion[Notion project tracker]
  Graph --> Dash[lev.now visual dashboard]
  Graph --> Brief[Daily brief and hygiene automation]
  NotionWorker[Future Notion Worker] --> Notion
  NotionWorker --> Graph

props.title: OpenBrain + Autowiki
props.content: Existing Lev intake frames the target as autowiki materialization plus OpenBrain structured data.

props.title: Graph Stack Definition
props.content: Lev design already says originals are immutable, LLM extracts structure, and projections regenerate from graph state.

props.title: Notion Boundary
props.content: plugins/notion is a thin direct API/CLI path. Workflow semantics belong above it in FlowMind/skills.

props.title: Kingly Root
props.content: Kingly now has a root .lev config, which can act as the portfolio/control plane without collapsing child workspaces.

items.title: Use local notionctl only for direct CRUD/query
items.description: Do not put triage policy or graph authority in notionctl.

items.title: Create Notion project tracker projection
items.description: Mirror work rows and status from the structured packet.

items.title: Add Notion Worker adapter
items.description: Hosted read-only levSearch first, then captureThought and scheduled syncs.
